steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $x+40=95$. To isolate $x$, subtract $40$ from both sides: $$x=95-40.$$

steps.title: Compute and check
steps.content: $95-40=55$, so $x=55$. Check: $55+40=95$, which matches the original equation. The subtraction undoes the added $40$, so no other operation is needed. The answer is 55.
